items.title: Associations of Accelerated Biological Aging With the Presence and Longitudinal Progression of Cerebral Small Vessel Disease.
items.abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a major cause of dementia and stroke, typically identified by lesions such as white matter hyperintensity (WMH), lacunes, cerebral microbleeds (CMBs), enlarged perivascular spaces, and brain atrophy. Biomarker-based biological age (BA), derived from routinely measured clinical indicators and largely reflecting vascular and metabolic physiologic burden, may provide complementary information beyond chronological age. The aim of this study was to investigate the associations between BA residual and both the presence and progression of CSVD and its neuroimaging manifestations. In the population-based Polyvascular Evaluation for Cognitive Impairment and Vascular Events cohort, participants underwent brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) at baseline (2017-2019) and at follow-up (2022-2024). BA was estimated using 3 established methods: PhenoAge, Klemera-Doubal method, and homeostatic dysregulation. Progression of CSVD and its imaging markers, including new lacunes, new CMBs, progression of enlarged perivascular spaces in the basal ganglia (BG-EPVS), and progression of WMHs, was assessed. Associations between BA residual and progression of CSVD were analyzed using logistic or ordinal logistic regression models, as appropriate. A total of 3,050 participants were included at baseline (mean age 61.22 ± 6.67 years; 53.51% female); 2,662 completed follow-up MRI over a median of 4.7 years, and 388 were lost to follow-up. Higher BA residual, particularly KDMAge and PhenoAge residual, was associated with greater CSVD burden at baseline and follow-up. Moreover, KDMAge residual was positively associated with the progression of total CSVD burden (odds ratio [OR] = 1.18, 95% CI 1.08-1.30;  This community-based cohort study demonstrated that BA residuals, particularly KDMAge and PhenoAge, were associated with higher odds of CSVD progression, especially with development of new lacunes and new CMBs. Biomarker-based BA residual may help identify individuals at higher risk of clinically relevant CSVD progression. Future studies with longer follow-up periods and more diverse cohorts are warranted to validate these findings.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の小血管病変（CSVD）は認知症や脳卒中の主要因であり、白質病変（WMH）、ラクーン、微小出血（CMBs）などの画像所見で評価される。生物学的年齢（BA）は血管・代謝負荷を反映し、実年齢を超えたリスク評価に有用と考えられている。  
方法：認知機能障害と血管イベントを対象とした地域住民コホート（Polyvascular Evaluation）にて、3,050名の参加者が2017-2019年に脳MRIを受け、約4.7年後に2,662名が再検査。BAはPhenoAge、Klemera-Doubal法（KDMAge）、ホメオスタシス異常の3手法で算出。CSVDの進行（新規ラクーン、新規CMBs、基底核の拡大血管周囲腔、WMH進行）との関連を回帰分析で検討。  
結果：KDMAgeおよびPhenoAgeのBA残差が高いほど、ベースラインおよび追跡時のCSVD負荷が大きく、特に新規ラクーンや新規CMBsの進行と有意に関連（KDMAge残差のCSVD進行に対するオッズ比1.18、95％CI 1.08-1.30）。  
結論：BA残差はCSVDの存在および進行リスクを示唆し、臨床的に重要なCSVD進行の早期発見に役立つ可能性がある。今後はより長期かつ多様な集団での検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、バイオマーカーに基づく生物学的年齢（BA）が脳小血管病（CSVD）の存在および進行と関連するかを検討した。3050名の地域住民を対象にMRIでCSVD指標を評価し、3種類のBA推定法で解析。特にKDMAgeとPhenoAgeのBA残差がCSVDの負荷および新たなラクーンや微小出血の進行と有意に関連した。BA残差はCSVDリスク評価に有用であり、さらなる長期・多様な集団での検証が必要である。

items.title: Functional Outcomes After Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Deep and Lobar Intracerebral Hemorrhage.
items.abstract: Intensive blood pressure (BP) reduction may reduce the risk of poor functional outcomes in patients with acute intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH). Whether these potential benefits apply similarly to lobar and deep ICH, 2 biologically and clinically distinct subtypes, remains uncertain. We tested the hypothesis that intensive BP reduction has differential effects on functional outcomes based on ICH location. We performed a stepwise meta-analysis, stratified by ICH location, of 3 landmark randomized clinical trials of intensive BP reduction: Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage (ATACH-2), Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage Trial 2 (INTERACT2), and INTERACT3. Step 1 pooled ATACH-2 and INTERACT2 (3-month outcomes; intensive BP lowering only). Step 2 added INTERACT3 (6-month outcomes; care bundle protocol with intensive BP lowering plus glucose management, antipyresis, and anticoagulant reversal). For ATACH-2, we used pooled results from individual patient data (adjusted for age, Glasgow Coma Scale score, and presence of intraventricular hemorrhage), whereas for INTERACT2 and INTERACT3, we used their pooled, publicly available results. Our exposure of interest contrasted intensive systolic BP targets <140 mm Hg vs standard care 140-180 mm Hg. Our outcome of interest was poor functional outcome, defined as a modified Rankin Scale score of 4-6 in ATACH-2 and INTERACT3 and of 3-6 in INTERACT2. Step 1 included a total of 2,983 patients with deep and 537 patients with lobar ICH (mean age 63 y/o, 37% female). Intensive BP reduction was not associated with a significant difference in poor functional outcome for either deep (odds ratio [OR] 0.89; 95% CI 0.40-1.98;  In this stepwise meta-analysis of 3 landmark ICH trials, intensive BP reduction did not demonstrate a significant benefit in either deep or lobar ICH. Although our estimates did not reach statistical significance, the direction of effect in deep ICH and the substantial heterogeneity across trials, particularly with the inclusion of INTERACT3, limit firm conclusions. Given these uncertainties and the biological distinctions between deep and lobar ICH, future well-powered studies specifically designed to test whether intensive BP reduction has differential effects by hematoma location are warranted.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性脳内出血（ICH）患者における集中的な血圧（BP）低下は、機能的予後の改善に寄与する可能性があるが、深部ICHと葉状ICHという異なる病態に対して効果が同等かは不明である。  
方法：ATACH-2、INTERACT2、INTERACT3の3つのランダム化臨床試験を対象に、ICHの部位別（深部・葉状）に集中的BP低下（収縮期血圧<140mmHg）と標準治療（140-180mmHg）を比較する段階的メタ解析を実施した。評価指標は修正Rankinスケールによる機能的予後不良である。  
結果：計3,520例（深部2,983例、葉状537例）を解析したが、深部・葉状いずれのICHにおいても集中的BP低下は有意な予後改善を示さなかった（深部ICHのオッズ比0.89、95%信頼区間0.40-1.98）。ただし、試験間の異質性やINTERACT3の介入内容の違いにより結論は限定的である。  
結論：深部・葉状ICHに対する集中的BP低下の効果は明確でなく、両者の生物学的差異を踏まえたさらなる大規模試験が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性脳内出血（ICH）患者における集中的な血圧低下の効果を、深部型と葉状型で比較した3つの大規模試験のメタ解析を実施した。結果、深部・葉状いずれのICHでも集中的血圧管理は機能的予後の有意な改善を示さなかった。ただし、深部ICHでの効果方向や試験間の異質性が大きく、明確な結論は困難である。今後、ICH部位別の効果を検証する十分な規模の研究が必要とされる。

items.title: Associations of Fine Particulate Matter and Its Specific Components With Recurrent Stroke and Secondary Morbidity and Mortality.
items.abstract: Ambient particulate matter <2.5 μm (PM We analyzed data from first-ever stroke patients in the Third China National Stroke Registry, and follow-up was conducted through March 2023. Ambient PM We included a total of 11,491 participants with a mean age of 61.5 ± 11.5 years, of whom 7,821 (68.1%) were male. We observed positive associations of PM Long-term exposure to PM
items.summary_ja:
背景：大気中の微小粒子状物質（PM2.5）とその特定成分が、脳卒中の再発および二次的な罹患・死亡に与える影響は明確でない。  
方法：中国の第三回全国脳卒中レジストリに登録された初回脳卒中患者11,491名（平均年齢61.5歳、男性68.1%）のデータを用い、2023年3月まで追跡調査を実施した。大気中のPM2.5濃度およびその成分と再発脳卒中、二次的罹患・死亡との関連を解析した。  
結果：長期的なPM2.5曝露は再発脳卒中のリスク増加と有意に関連し、特に特定のPM2.5成分がこれらのリスクに強く影響を及ぼすことが示された。  
結論：PM2.5およびその特定成分への長期曝露は脳卒中患者の再発および二次的な健康悪化リスクを高めるため、公衆衛生対策として大気汚染の管理が重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、中国の初回脳卒中患者11,491名（平均年齢61.5歳）を対象に、大気中の微小粒子状物質（PM2.5）とその特定成分が再発脳卒中および二次的な罹患・死亡率に与える影響を調査した。長期的なPM2.5曝露が再発リスクおよび二次的合併症の増加と関連することを明らかにし、大気汚染対策の重要性を示唆している。

items.title: Neurovascular Unit Dysfunction and Cerebral Small Vessel Disease in Parkinson Disease: A Systematic Review and a Meta Analysis.
items.abstract: Parkinson disease (PD) pathogenesis remains incompletely understood; beyond nigrostriatal loss, nondopaminergic mechanisms including neurovascular unit dysfunction may contribute to disability. Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) burden reflects neurovascular dysfunction in the form of white matter hyperintensities (WMH), lacunes, cerebral microbleeds (CMB), and enlarged perivascular spaces (ePVS). In PD cohorts, CSVD burden correlates with worse motor and gait scores. The aim of the study was to explore whether patients with PD exhibit greater CSVD burden than healthy controls (HC). We conducted a PRISMA-conformant systematic review and meta-analysis of studies including adults with idiopathic PD and a HC group that presented data comparing CSVD burden in these 2 groups. Six databases (MEDLINE, Embase, CINAHL Plus, CENTRAL, Scopus, and Web of Science) were searched on May 14 and 15, 2024. Two reviewers independently screened records, extracted data, and assessed risk of bias, with discrepancies resolved by consensus. Continuous outcomes were pooled as standardized mean differences (SMD); dichotomous outcomes as odds ratios (ORs). We evaluated small-study effects for pooled analyses with 10 or more studies using funnel plots and Egger regression test. We examined 13,403 records. Forty-six studies (45 cross-sectional) met inclusion criteria, totaling 3,817 PD and 2,593 HC (mean ages: 66.9 and 66.5, respectively). WMH volume (k = 21) was higher in PD (SMD 0.36, 95% CI 0.11-0.62). Visual ratings also indicated higher WMH in PD: global (k = 14) SMD 0.27 (95% CI 0.08-0.46); periventricular (k = 11) SMD 0.32 (95% CI 0.12-0.51); deep (k = 8) SMD 0.20 (95% CI 0.09-0.31). Differences in CMB (k = 6; OR 1.18, 95% CI 0.57-2.42) and lacunes (k = 4; OR 1.48, 95% CI 0.58-3.78) were not significant. ePVS results were heterogeneous but trended toward greater burden in PD, most notably in the midbrain (k = 3; SMD 1.80, 0.15-3.44). Overall evidence quality was rated as low, reflecting the observational nature of the included studies. Our analysis showed PD to be associated with greater WMH burden and increased midbrain ePVS. Pooled differences in CMB and lacunes were not significant. Substantial heterogeneity and cross-sectional designs limit certainty; standardized imaging and prospective cohorts are needed to define mechanisms and clinical implications.
items.summary_ja:
背景：パーキンソン病（PD）の病態は完全には解明されておらず、神経血管ユニット（NVU）機能障害が障害進行に関与すると考えられている。脳小血管病（CSVD）は白質高信号（WMH）、ラクーン、微小出血（CMB）、拡大血管周囲腔（ePVS）などで表され、PD患者の運動機能悪化と関連する。  
方法：PRISMA基準に準拠し、PD患者と健常対照（HC）を比較したCSVD負荷に関する研究を6データベースから系統的に検索・メタ解析した。合計46研究（PD 3,817例、HC 2,593例）を対象とした。  
結果：PD群はWMH体積（標準化平均差[SMD]0.36）および視覚評価による全体・脳室周囲・深部WMH（SMD 0.20～0.32）が有意に高かった。CMBおよびラクーンの差は有意でなかった。ePVSは中脳でPD群に多い傾向（SMD 1.80）を示したが、結果は異質性が大きかった。  
結論：PDはWMH負荷の増加および中脳のePVS増加と関連するが、CMBやラクーンの差は明確でない。観察研究中心で異質性が高いため、標準化された画像解析と前向き研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: パーキンソン病（PD）患者は健常者に比べ、白質高信号（WMH）や中脳の拡大血管周囲腔（ePVS）の負荷が有意に高いことが示された。一方、脳微小出血（CMB）やラクーンの差は有意でなかった。これらは神経血管ユニット機能障害を反映し、PDの運動障害に寄与する可能性があるが、研究の異質性や横断的デザインにより結論は限定的であり、標準化された画像解析と前向き研究が必要である。

items.title: The Muscle Cramp Impact Index: A Patient-Centered Scale for the Assessment of Muscle Cramps.
items.abstract: Muscle cramps are common, variably disabling, and lack a comprehensive validated tool to assess their multidimensional effect. Previous cramp studies have relied primarily on cramp frequency and intensity, despite qualitative work demonstrating that sleep disturbance, daytime functioning, and mental health are also important to patients. Guided by these findings, the aim of this study was to develop and validate a patient-reported outcome measure, the Muscle Cramp Impact Index (MCII), to assess the effect of muscle cramps across diverse etiologies and clinical settings. This was a multisite, prospective scale-development and validation study conducted in neuromuscular, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, hepatology, and kidney clinics at the University Health Network/Mount Sinai Hospital and Sunnybrook Health Sciences Centre (2018-2022). MCII item generation was based on a previous qualitative study, literature review, and cognitive interviews with affected patients. Content validity was assessed through review by 27 international neuromuscular and muscle cramp experts. Adult patients experiencing muscle cramps within the preceding 2 weeks were enrolled. Draft items were evaluated for missing data, floor/ceiling effects, and exploratory factor analysis (EFA). Test-retest reliability was assessed in clinically stable patients over a 2-week interval using weighted κ and intraclass correlation coefficients (ICCs). Construct validity was examined through predefined hypotheses correlating MCII scores with established measures of sleep disturbance, mood, pain, stiffness, and quality of life. A total of 105 patients (40% female individuals; mean age 60.0 ± 14.2 years) completed the field testing. Eighteen draft items were refined to 16 after patient and expert review. All items demonstrated low missingness (<6%). EFA identified 3 domains-cramp frequency/distribution, sleep interference, and interference with daily life-and 2 items were removed for floor effects or low factor loadings, yielding a final 14-item measure (score range 0-42). The MCII demonstrated moderate correlations with EuroQol 5 Dimension, Epworth Sleepiness Scale, Beck Depression Inventory, and Sleep Disturbance scores. Test-retest reliability was excellent (n = 57; ICC 0.83, 95% CI 0.72-0.89), confirming strong measurement stability. The MCII is a patient-centered, psychometrically robust measure capturing the multidimensional effect of muscle cramps. Limitations include reliance on self-reported clinical stability and inability to verify respondent identity for mailed questionnaires. Further evaluation of responsiveness and validation in additional cramp populations is warranted to support broader implementation.
items.summary_ja:
背景：筋肉痙攣は頻繁に起こり、患者の日常生活や睡眠、精神状態に多面的な影響を与えるが、その影響を総合的に評価する検証済みのツールは存在しない。  
方法：多施設共同で、患者報告アウトカム尺度「Muscle Cramp Impact Index（MCII）」を開発・検証した。対象は神経筋疾患、ALS、肝疾患、腎疾患のクリニック通院患者105名。質的研究や文献レビュー、認知面接を基に項目を作成し、専門家の内容妥当性評価、探索的因子分析、信頼性検証、構成概念妥当性検証を実施。  
結果：18項目から16項目に絞り込み、最終的に14項目（0-42点）で3因子（痙攣頻度・分布、睡眠障害、日常生活障害）を特定。MCIIは既存の睡眠障害、うつ症状、生活の質指標と中程度の相関を示し、テスト・リテスト信頼性は高かった（ICC=0.83）。  
結論：MCIIは患者中心で多面的な筋肉痙攣の影響を評価可能な信頼性の高い尺度である。今後は反応性の検証や他疾患群での妥当性確認が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、筋肉痙攣の多面的影響を評価する患者中心の尺度「Muscle Cramp Impact Index（MCII）」を開発・検証した。105名の患者を対象に、睡眠障害や日常生活への影響など3領域を含む14項目で構成。信頼性・妥当性が高く、従来の頻度・強度評価を超えた包括的評価が可能となった。今後は他疾患群での検証や感度評価が必要である。
